verdict: Clay-based peel masks use mineral-heavy formulas to extract sebum and blackheads through suction-removal. While budget-friendly, the mechanical peel method can be harsh and temporary without sustained chemical exfoliation.

_research.name: Rubber Blackhead Removal Mask
pros: Bentonite clay is gentle mineral ingredient
_research.con: Mechanical extraction can cause irritation, redness, and temporary sensitivity; results don't address root sebum production.
